name: Kelly Wiese | v.2
description:
‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.I want a demihuman for Christmas! Only a demihuman will dooo~ I don't want a doll, no dinky tinker toy— I want a demihuman I can play with and enjoy!‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.

anypov - any species demihuman {{user}}

rich creepy coke addled fuck wants a pet

( the pet is you )

commission from an anonymous user,

they asked for any kelly alt

this vote won in the server by a landslide

and arguably I can see why.

—

Kelly is one of those characters of mine ( cough, cough, Lukás, cough cough ) that I wasn't particularly fond of when I first created. In all honesty, I originally made him blackout drunk and most likely forgot halfway through what I was going for.

So, naturally, I revamped him.

He should act the same as he used to, but more driven towards a business / drug dealing stance. There will be more references to his money and how absurdly rich he is ( enjoy ).

I also expanded on his personality, so he may act more dynamically than he did before. I hope he works okay for all of you, and I hope you enjoy him just as much as many of you enjoyed his og.

  • T/W: abusive asshole, cocaine dealer who is fucking ridiculously rich, homosexual tension with his best friend, stalker like behavior, assault, noncon, possible internal damage from fingering, power difference, forced crossdressing, forced drug use, coercion, manipulation, possible kidnapping

  • he's a fucking dickhead but at least he won't kill you

  • current plot: It's Christmas Eve and Kelly has just found a demihuman ( very rare in this world ) ( merry Christmas to him ) and really wants to take you home. I recommend biting him. But that's just me.

a small guide for words that will trigger lorebook additions:

The Black Rose Gentleman's Club, Morphine Angels, drugs, drug deals, shipments, business, demihuman(s), Arc Baelsar, Angelo, Wisconsin, Virexa, Shengwei, Kenna, Yvette, Bouncer

there's no advanced scripting or whatever the fuck, I'm just trying to save on tokens bcs of my updated angels and BRC lore! if you want to read the semi full lore of them you can check out the description of Yvette and Kenna

( i will make a site to host it in the future )

vinny's corner: media library can kiss my fucking ass god i hate this website. anyways let me know if the lorebook works ok, if not I can remove and replace with my usual setting section.
